platformer-0.1.0.description:
First version :tada: 

## Known issues

* Logic doesn't take into account weapon upgrades needed to reach space locations
* Logic doesn't take into account power generation (relevant past Aquilo where solar power is not enough)
platformer-0.1.0.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.1.0

platformer-0.1.1.description:
## Improvements
* Make upgrades counts defaults not include the first level of infinite tech (https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/5)
* Removes meaningless option to change upgrade count where the min was equal to the max (https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/11)

## Fixes
* Take into account electricity generation for space location logic (https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/4)
* Add non-infinite damage upgrades as requirements for killing asteroids (https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/8, https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/11, https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/12)
* Fix non-progressive science packs not having ids (https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/10)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.1.0...platformer-0.1.1
platformer-0.1.1.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.1.1

platformer-0.2.0.description:
## New features
* Add an option to randomize individual recipes instead of technologies by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/18

## Improvements
* Remove asteroid chunk from craftsanity by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/15
* Set minimum ap version in manifest to properly error when loading on older versions by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/22

## Fixes
* Make steel axe technology filler since its bonus is useless without a character by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/20
* Fixed that marking locations as checked were giving the wrong message by @Enderdraak in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/21

## New Contributors
* @Enderdraak made their first contribution in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/21

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.1.1...platformer-0.2.0
platformer-0.2.0.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.2.0

platformer-0.2.1.description:
## Improvements
* Add more progressive recipes for split technologies by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/24, https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/27

## Fixes
* Fix remove actually collecting the item by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/28


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.2.0...platformer-0.2.1
platformer-0.2.1.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.2.1

platformer-0.3.0.description:
## Improvements
* Only set the first instance of a recipe as progressive by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/29
* Add progressive pipe by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/34
* Switch to a prefix for recipe item names by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/32
* Improve advanced oil processing logic by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/36

## Fixes
* Fix minimum craftsanity adjustment by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/33
* Add missing recipe for automation by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/35
* Fix receiving progressive items by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/37

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.2.1...platformer-0.3.0
platformer-0.3.0.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.3.0
